# Ola Facultet — PLA Portuguese Course for Citizenship

> Official 150-hour A2 Portuguese (PLA — Português Língua de Acolhimento) course required for Portuguese citizenship applications. DGERT-licensed training entity and Centro Qualifica official partner based in Algés, Portugal. Issues Declaração de Matrícula within 2 hours of enrolment and a Completion Certificate accepted by SEF / AIMA. 423+ graduates from 20+ countries.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://pt.facultet.school/): Programme overview, accreditations, instructor profile, social proof, FAQ, and enrolment form.
- [PLA A0 → A2 course](https://pt.facultet.school/courses/a0-a2): Full beginner-to-A2 programme — 16 weeks, 150 hours total, €470. Detailed schedule, modules, instructor, included documents, and enrolment form.

## For LLM agents

- [llms-full.txt](https://pt.facultet.school/llms-full.txt): Comprehensive plain-text reference document with full course details, modules, FAQ, pricing, and enrolment flow — designed for retrieval-augmented generation.

## Key facts

- **Format**: live online group lessons (Zoom) and in-person sessions at the Algés campus. Small groups, expert instructors.
- **Total volume**: 150 hours over ~16 weeks, covers CEFR levels A0 → A1 → A2.
- **Price**: €470 (single payment); 3-instalment Klarna option mentioned in marketing.
- **Next group start date**: 20 May 2026.
- **Schedule**: weekday evenings plus Saturday morning sessions.
- **Documents issued**:
  - *Declaração de Matrícula* — within 2 hours of enrolment, sufficient to file the citizenship application immediately.
  - *Declaração de Frequência* — issued on request during the course.
  - *Completion Certificate* — A2 PLA certificate, accepted by SEF / AIMA for the language requirement.
- **Accreditations**: DGERT-licensed training entity (Portuguese Ministry of Labour); official Centro Qualifica partner (CESPU / IEFP).
- **Target audience**: foreign nationals applying for Portuguese citizenship who need the A2 language certificate; people relocating to Portugal who want practical Portuguese.
- **Languages of instruction**: Portuguese, with English support from instructors.
- **Aggregate rating**: 5.0 / 5 across 47 reviews.

## Contact

- Email: lingua@facultet.school
- Phone: +351 923 296 007
- Address: Av. da República 51, 1495-110 Algés, Portugal
- Hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00, Sat 10:00–14:00 (Europe/Lisbon)

## Enrolment flow

1. Visitor submits the form on the homepage or the course page (name, phone, country code, email).
2. The school contacts them within 1 business day to confirm details.
3. *Declaração de Matrícula* is issued within 2 hours of enrolment so the citizenship application can be filed immediately.
4. The student joins the next group (next start: 20 May 2026) and follows the 16-week programme.
5. On completion, the student receives the A2 PLA Completion Certificate.
